meta.title: Farms App — Commercial Role
meta.topic: Who Commercials are, their regions, and what they can create/see.

questions.text: Who creates a Commercial user and assigns them to their country?
options: A local lead/manager in that country

questions.text: Who should decide which regions within a country a Commercial is allowed to create farms in?
questions.help: This person needs local knowledge of that country's areas — e.g. someone at head office may not know the regions of Kenya or Mexico.
options: A local lead/manager in that country
The Commercial proposes their areas and someone approves

questions.text: Within their country, does a Commercial always work in specific regions, or can a Commercial cover the whole country?
questions.help: e.g. in Australia a Commercial covers QLD plus parts of NSW; other countries may not split into regions at all.

questions.text: How fine-grained are a Commercial's regions? Tick every level you use.
questions.help: e.g. 'QLD' is a state; 'parts of NSW' might be shires/council areas.
options: Custom areas drawn on a map

questions.text: Can the same region be assigned to more than one Commercial, or must each region belong to only one?
options: Each region belongs to only one Commercial (no overlap)
A region can be shared by more than one Commercial

questions.text: Should a Commercial be able to create/edit farms only inside their assigned regions, or anywhere in their country?
Which farms should a Commercial be able to SEE (view, not necessarily edit)?
options: Only farms in their own regions
All farms in their own country

questions.text: Can a Commercial edit or delete a farm that a DIFFERENT Commercial created?
options: No — only the farms they created
Yes — any farm within their regions
Yes — any farm in their country
